title: Project: Arena
body:
# Project: Arena

Greetings from a modpack created for competitive players by competitive players. This pack provides everything you need without the clutter, whether you're honing your aim, fighting fierce factions, or moving up the ranks in ranked arenas.

Some PVP servers only support newer Minecraft versions. Using older Minecraft versions is not recommended.

**Important Features**:
Performance First: During hectic team battles, 200+ frames per second are guaranteed thanks to the power of Sodium.

**Visual Clarity**: You can never lose sight of your target thanks to low-fire effects, and clean textures.

**Quality of Life**: Custom crosshairs, potion effect timers, and an integrated armor status HUD.

**_DISCLAIMER_**: _This modpack only includes client-side mods that are allowed on major competitive servers_
